story_summary_zh: 讲解者用一间间象征的房间——画像、尘土、火焰、宫殿、铁笼、审判之梦——教导天路客分辨属灵的真实，预备他的眼睛与心。
story_summary_en: The Interpreter teaches the pilgrim through symbolic rooms—a portrait, dust, hidden fire, a palace, an iron cage, a dream of judgement—training his eyes and heart to discern spiritual reality.
spiritual_theme_zh: 属灵分辨：求神开我们的眼，看出表象底下的真相，并被圣灵引导进入真理。
spiritual_theme_en: Spiritual discernment: asking God to open our eyes to the truth beneath appearances, led into truth by the Spirit.

bible_references.note_zh: 求你开我的眼睛，使我看出你律法中的奇妙。
bible_references.note_en: Open my eyes, that I may behold wondrous things out of your law.

bible_references.note_zh: 真理的圣灵来了，要引导你们进入一切真理。
bible_references.note_en: When the Spirit of truth comes, he will guide you into all truth.

bible_references.note_zh: 属血气的人不领会神圣灵的事……惟有属灵的人才能看透。
bible_references.note_en: The natural person does not accept the things of the Spirit; they are spiritually discerned.

discussion_questions.question_zh: 讲解者之家里哪一个房间让你印象最深？为什么？
discussion_questions.question_en: Which room in the Interpreter's House struck you most, and why?

discussion_questions.question_zh: 火焰房间里，仇敌泼水却浇不灭火，因为有人在墙后浇油——这是什么意思？
discussion_questions.question_en: In the fire room, the enemy throws water but the fire won't die because someone pours oil behind the wall—what does this mean?

discussion_questions.question_zh: 你最近一次『看错』属灵的事，是什么让你后来看清的？
discussion_questions.question_en: When did you last misread something spiritual—what later helped you see clearly?

teacher_notes_zh: 铁笼之人是警戒，不要轻看恩典直到心硬。
讲解者最后指向十字架——分辨是为了走向基督。
teacher_notes_en: The man in the iron cage is a warning against despising grace until the heart hardens.
The Interpreter finally points to the Cross—discernment is for moving toward Christ.
reflection_prompt_zh: 写下：有什么属灵真相，我『知道』却还没有『看见』？
reflection_prompt_en: Write down: what spiritual truth do I 'know' but have not yet 'seen'?
prayer_prompt_zh: 主啊，求你开我的眼睛，借着你的灵引导我进入真理，使我能分辨真假。
prayer_prompt_en: Lord, open my eyes; by your Spirit guide me into truth, that I may discern the true from the false.
